is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study of Plasmodium falciparum blood samples from patients in Malawi.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Genotyped pfcrt K76T, dhfr N51I/C59R/S108N, dhps A437G/K540E — target codons Pfcrt76, Pfdhfr51/59/108, Pfdhps437/540.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Table 1 gives pfcrt mutant %, dhfr triple %, dhps double %, quintuple % with N=148 (Blantyre) and N=183 (Karonga) and 95% CIs.

sub_country_location.evidence: Two named sub-national sites: Kaporo health centre, Karonga district (northern Malawi) and Queen Elizabeth Central Hospital, Blantyre. Frequencies reported per site.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Karonga samples collected in May 2007; Blantyre samples collected in 2007 — single-year windows.

african_field_samples.evidence: Field/clinical fingerprick and whole blood samples from patients in Malawi.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary prevalence study with own DNA extraction, PCR genotyping and results.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Samples collected as part of an antimalarial drug resistance study approved by College of Medicine; new field collection, no consortium overlap stated. Mbeya data are from Schönfeld et al. (external, excluded).

supplement.evidence: All per-locus frequencies are in Table 1 of the main text.

assessment.summary: Primary prevalence study genotyping pfcrt K76T, dhfr and dhps mutations in P. falciparum from two Malawi sites (Karonga N=183, Blantyre N=148) collected in 2007. Table 1 provides extractable per-site mutant frequencies with CIs. Mbeya, Tanzania data are cited from another study and not used.
